shot_type_and_framing: medium shot with both dispenser and tumbler centered vertically and horizontally within the frame
camera_movement: slow lateral track from left to right
lens_and_cinematic_look: full-frame feel with a moderate focal length around 50mm, shallow depth of field softly blurring the background
environment_description: minimalist, neutral-toned bathroom counter with a smooth marble surface and a plain off-white wall background
subject_description: a set of two beige marble-textured bathroom accessories including a soap dispenser with a metallic pump on the left and an open top tumbler on the right, both decorated with a mid-band of subtle geometric perforations, placed on a matching rectangular tray
motion_behavior: natural, smooth camera motion with no impact on the stationary objects
